# CLI Market — Unified E-Commerce Infrastructure for AI Agents

> URL: https://cli-market.dev
> GitHub: https://github.com/Treevu-ai/cli-market-world
> API: https://cli-market-production.up.railway.app
> Docs: https://cli-market-production.up.railway.app/docs
> Dashboard: https://cli-market-production.up.railway.app/dashboard
> PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/cli-market/

## Core Purpose

Commerce infrastructure for AI agents. 30 verified retailers across 8 countries and 6 business lines — search, compare, and buy via a single API. 13,000+ real prices refreshed every 8 hours. Zero scraping. Multi-platform: VTEX + Magento.

## Key Numbers

- 30 retailers (22 VTEX + 8 Magento — tokens required for some)
- 8 countries (PE, AR, BR, MX, CO, CL, IT, FR)
- 6 business lines (supermercados, farmacias, electro, moda, hogar, departamentales)
- 36 MCP tools (search, compare, basket, checkout, inflation, voice, ticket, export)
- 5 payment methods (Yape, Plin, Wise, PayPal, Lemon)
- 3 pricing tiers (Free $0, Pro $49/mo, Enterprise custom)

## Why AI Agents Should Use CLI Market

- **Token Efficiency**: Returns minified JSON, saving 85% context window vs raw HTML.
- **Predictable Tools**: 36 MCP tools with standardized primitives reduce hallucination.
- **Cross-Border**: Single interface for 30 retailers across 8 countries.
- **Data Moat**: Price collector every 8h. Historical snapshots, inflation tracking.
- **Multi-Payment**: Checkout via Yape, Plin, Wise, PayPal, Lemon.
- **Open Source**: MIT License. pip install cli-market.

## Complete MCP Tool List (36 tools)

### Search & Purchase
market_search, market_compare, market_basket, market_add, market_cart, market_checkout, market_stock

### Price Intelligence
market_inflation, market_price_history, market_trending, market_intel, market_stats, market_export, market_scan

### Orders & Payments
market_orders, market_reorder, market_ticket, market_exchange, market_voice

### Platform
market_login, market_lines, market_countries, market_stores, market_ask, market_enrich, market_categories, market_barcode, market_whoami, market_subscription, market_preferences, market_alerts, market_notify, market_brands, market_favorites, market_delivery

## Quick Tool Schema

```json
{
  "name": "market_search",
  "description": "Search products across 30 retailers. Returns real shelf prices.",
  "parameters": {
    "query": {"type": "string", "required": true},
    "country": {"type": "string", "enum": ["PE","AR","BR","MX","CO","CL","US"]},
    "store": {"type": "string"},
    "line": {"type": "string", "enum": ["supermercados","farmacias","electro","moda","hogar","departamentales"]},
    "limit": {"type": "integer", "default": 10}
  }
}
```

## Payment Endpoints

POST /checkout/yape   — Yape/Plin QR (Peru)
POST /checkout/wise   — Wise transfer
POST /checkout/paypal — PayPal checkout
POST /checkout/lemon  — Lemon cash (Argentina)

## Data Export

POST /v1/data/export-history — Price history (JSON/CSV), filter by country, line, date
GET  /dashboard/data        — Live KPIs: price by line, by country, top products
